Drum Program

What you'll learn.

Personalized lessons that help students grow musically and confidently.

Rhythm & Timing

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Drum Technique

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Live Performance

Hands-on coaching that builds skill, confidence, discipline, and real musical application.

Who Can Join?

Drum Lessons for every skill level.

Whether you're just starting or ready to refine your skill, ORDS helps students grow with personalized instruction and musical discipline.

01
Beginners

We match each student with a path that fits their goals, pace, and musical background.

02
Intermediate Players

We match each student with a path that fits their goals, pace, and musical background.

03
Worship & Live Performance

We match each student with a path that fits their goals, pace, and musical background.
